import sys

def main():
    V1, V2, V3 = map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split())

    # Volume of a single cube
    cube_vol = 7 * 7 * 7

    # Total volume of all cubes
    total_vol = V1 + V2 + V3

    # Check if the total volume is valid
    if total_vol > 3 * cube_vol:
        print("No")
        return

    # Try placing the cubes in a way that overlaps are controlled
    # Place first cube at (0, 0, 0)
    a1, b1, c1 = 0, 0, 0

    # Place second cube at (0, 6, 0) to overlap on y-axis
    a2, b2, c2 = 0, 6, 0

    # Place third cube at (6, 0, 0) to overlap on x-axis
    a3, b3, c3 = 6, 0, 0

    # Compute the volumes
    # Volume of intersection of all three cubes
    overlap_all = 1 * 1 * 7  # (6-7) in x, (6-7) in y, full z

    # Volume of intersection of exactly two cubes
    overlap_two = 2 * 1 * 7  # Two regions of (0-6) in one axis, (6-7) in another

    # Volume of exactly one cube
    overlap_one = cube_vol - overlap_two - overlap_all

    if overlap_one == V1 and overlap_two == V2 and overlap_all == V3:
        print("Yes")
        print(f"{a1} {b1} {c1} {a2} {b2} {c2} {a3} {b3} {c3}")
    else:
        print("No")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
